blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,961 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
